ddls:
CREATE TABLE "material_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material sample */,
  "is_genuine" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sample is genuine or counterfeit */,
  "diagonal" REAL /* Diagonal measurement of the sample */,
  "height_left" REAL /* Height measurement on the left side of the sample */,
  "height_right" REAL /* Height measurement on the right side of the sample */,
  "margin_low" REAL /* Margin measurement at the lower end of the sample */,
  "margin_up" REAL /* Margin measurement at the upper end of the sample */,
  "length" REAL /* Overall length of the sample */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier who provided the material */,
  "material_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of material */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project for which the material is intended */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the batch of materials */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was manufactured */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was inspected for quality */,
  "inspection_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who performed the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_samples_inspection_by FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_samples_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_samples_material_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_type_id") REFERENCES material_types ("material_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_samples_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each construction project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the construction project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Estimated budget for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., In Planning, Under Construction, Completed) */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client or organization commissioning the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test conducted */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material sample being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Outcome of the test (Pass/Fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the test */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who conducted the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test conducted (e.g., Tensile Strength, Compressive Strength) */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality standard the test is based on */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Conditions under which the test was conducted (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES quality_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES material_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating based on past performance */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the supplier was registered with the firm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., engineer, technician) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to (e.g., Quality Control, Engineering) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the employee */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications the employee holds (e.g., PE, PMP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_types" (
  "material_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material type */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material type (e.g., Concrete, Steel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material type */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material */,
  "tensile_strength" REAL /* Tensile strength of the material */,
  "compressive_strength" REAL /* Compressive strength of the material */,
  "thermal_conductivity" REAL /* Thermal conductivity of the material */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard (e.g., ASTM C150) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "standard_type" TEXT /* Type of standard (e.g., National, International) */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the standard was published */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the last revision to the standard */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the standard needs to be renewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test that generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings in the report */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is approved or not */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who generated the report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project for which the report was generated */,
  "material_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of material tested */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality standard the report is based on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES quality_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_material_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_type_id") REFERENCES material_types ("material_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test being assigned */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee responsible for the test */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was made */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test assigned */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality standard the test is based on */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the test should be completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_assignments_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_assignments_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES quality_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_assignments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test for which this result applies */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement taken (e.g., diagonal, height left) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result (e.g., mm, kg, N) */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Acceptable tolerance for the measurement */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality standard the result is compared against */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES quality_standards ("standard_id")
)
